The gloss like ‚ÄúPFV/IPFV‚Äù might look senseless, but in fact the verbs commonly distinguish between radical used in i) perfective forms, ii) imperfective forms and iii) masdar-like forms such as masdar itself, optative and sometimes imperative. So, the gloss here signals the stem that can be used in both perfective and imperfective forms, but not in the masdar-like series of forms, cf. accu- milk.MAS-.
